verdict: A partial-collateral yield stablecoin with a real fee anchor but a subsidized boost and a points program. No engine at 2, one structure flag (S11) - expect deleveraging/bleed risk if the subsidy tapers before organic demand matures. Zero-price test: marginal pass (redemption claim exists, but demand is subsidy-heavy).
mechanism: Dual-track: (1) a PSM-style redemption against exogenous reserves (healthy anchor), (2) a boosted-yield vault funded partly by a declining subsidy. Classify as Model 4 (supply/incentive) with a Model 1 (run) tail if coverage slips. Expected failure shape: bleed, not run, unless coverage < 1.

S1.reason: 20% of reserves in an affiliated LST

S2.reason: boost yield subsidized; runway 14mo, taper published

S10.reason: LST reserve imports one external risk

S11.reason: organic TVL share 24%; most TVL arrived with the points program

S12.reason: some looped usage on lending markets, capped

S13.reason: vote-locked + 4-day timelock; quorum floor above borrowable float

S14.reason: token lendable on one venue; caps present but oracle window short

stress_test: sim4 at coverage 1.1: run basin ~22% (only severe panic). sim (LVR) on the main pool: fee APR 9% vs LVR ~6% -> LPs marginally profitable without emissions. Design survives a 2022-grade drawdown if the subsidy tapers on schedule.
contagion: LST reserve is the main external link (S10=1). No key-person leverage found. Most plausible contagion path: the reserve LST de-pegs -> coverage slips below 1 -> the Model-1 run tail activates.

valuation.quadrant: priced for perfection (low structural risk, rich vs fee multiple)
valuation.notes: Fee multiple ~40x vs peers at ~15-25x; the premium prices in the subsidy-funded growth continuing. Not a price target - contextualizes the audit.

prescriptions: [structure] S11 - vest points past TGE, reward fee-paying usage not parked TVL, publish the organic-baseline dashboard
[watch] S2 - hold runway >= 12mo at current token price; taper by rule not vote
[watch] S5/S10 - monitor reserve-LST peg and coverage; pre-commit the gate ladder
[watch] S14 - lengthen the oracle window or tighten the borrow cap on the lending venue
limitations: S10 and S12 are estimated (limited on-chain visibility into loop positions). Verdict would worsen to high-risk if the subsidy taper slips or the reserve LST concentration rises. Re-score after the next points snapshot.
